svg.text: Conv_Simple / CV-101 (garage conveyor) — Generated wire list — every conductor across E-003..E-007 (this sheet carries no wires of its own)
• X1 (field terminal strip, devices.yaml) is where field devices land
before the PLC. Its physical terminal-strip layout and numbering are NOT
documented in any recovered source — FIELD VERIFY. This table lists the
conductors on each side of it, indexed by their owning sheet — it is not
• Rows are sorted by sheet, then wire number/label. VERIFIED (black) vs
FIELD VERIFY (red) mirrors each conductor's status on its owning sheet —
see that sheet for the drawn circuit and evidence.
model/wires.yaml · model/e007_rs485.yaml (generated — do not hand-edit this
